user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Levi's
Product type: 501 Original jeans
Tone: authentic, classic, rugged
Visual style: Clean, vintage-inspired imagery with a focus on denim texture and timeless Americana aesthetics.
Conceptual technique: heritage storytelling with lifestyle authenticity
Format: image

brief.headline: 501 Originals: Denim's Timeless Anthem
brief.caption: A rugged, sun-drenched scene of a vintage motorcycle parked against a weathered brick wall, with a lone rider casually leaning back, showcasing the iconic Levi's red tab on the rear pocket of their well-worn 501 jeans.
brief.visual_style: Clean, vintage-inspired imagery with a focus on denim texture and timeless Americana aesthetics.
brief.typography_style: Bold slab serif with a retro finish, echoing classic Americana signage.
brief.color_scheme: indigo blue denim, rustic brick red, and muted earthy tones
